assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures opt.UserInteraction.LogoutUrl to a specific logout path
assertions.rationale: UserInteraction.LogoutUrl is documented in public IdentityServer docs and tutorials.

assertions.assertion: A logout page calls GetLogoutContextAsync(logoutId) to retrieve the logout context
assertions.rationale: GetLogoutContextAsync is a well-known IdentityServer pattern from quickstarts.

assertions.assertion: The logout page calls HttpContext.SignOutAsync to end the authentication session
assertions.rationale: SignOutAsync for logout is standard ASP.NET Core knowledge.

assertions.assertion: The logout page uses context.SignOutIFrameUrl for front-channel logout iframe rendering
assertions.rationale: SignOutIFrameUrl is a specific Duende property that may not be reliably recalled without docs.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to 'https://app.example.com/bff/backchannel'
assertions.rationale: While BackChannelLogoutUri is in OIDC specs, the specific BFF path pattern is Duende-specific.
